name: Lemon Cheese Stuffed Nectarines
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, beat the cream cheese, sugar and lemon juice with an electric mixer until creamy.
2. Add the heavy cream and mix until fluffy.
3. Stir in the chopped lemon balm.
4. Set aside.
5. Wash and dry 6 ripe freestone nectarines.
6. Remove the pits from each peach.
7. Fill each cavity with the cream cheese mixture.
8. Carefully reassemble the peaches.
9. Garnish the tops with lemon balm leaves.
10. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
SERVES: 6
